core_payload.content:
# AI Wallet

## 1. Dream Direction
The Dream branch imagines AI Wallet becoming a true portfolio manager for intelligence access inside N1Hub.

## 2. Desired Future State
- API providers, hosted model lanes, and subscription lanes managed as one coherent portfolio
- better provider health and readiness visibility before agents attempt long background work
- clearer routing posture for day co-pilot, night autonomy, batch windows, and premium reasoning lanes
- safer support for local ChatGPT or Codex access without exposing raw token plumbing in normal UI flows
- stronger linkage between wallet state, control surfaces, control-plane budgets, and agent runtime policy
- assignment-aware routing metadata so background work can pick the right lane without improvisation

## 3. Why It Matters
Dream preserves the idea that model access should not feel like a loose drawer of keys. It should feel like a governed supply system for intelligence, with health, routing, ownership, safety posture, and budget posture visible enough for real autonomous work.

neuro_concentrate.summary: AI Wallet in the Dream branch preserves the idea that model access in N1Hub should be managed as a governed intelligence portfolio, not a loose drawer of keys. It imagines healthier provider readiness, clearer routing across API, hosted-model, and subscription lanes, stronger budget and assignment posture, and safer support for background autonomy and local ChatGPT or Codex access. The capsule matters because real agent systems need ownership, health, routing posture, and secrecy boundaries at the credential layer itself.
